query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, JSON_EXTRACT(up.permissions, '$.data_sync') as data_sync, JSON_EXTRACT(up.permissions, '$.excel_import_customers') as excel_import_customers, JSON_EXTRACT(up.permissions, '$.api_sync_execute') as api_sync_execute FROM users u LEFT JOIN userPermissions up ON u.id = up.userId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user VDyW8BBNx15QJxW.root --database DN8ihETPKNPmGxAqBwYu7X --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, JSON_EXTRACT(up.permissions, '$.data_sync') as data_sync, JSON_EXTRACT(up.permissions, '$.excel_import_customers') as excel_import_customers, JSON_EXTRACT(up.permissions, '$.api_sync_execute') as api_sync_execute FROM users u LEFT JOIN userPermissions up ON u.id = up.userId;
